options.name: --learn
options.description: Discover available sub-commands and their parameters without executing any Azure operation. Use on a command group (e.g. 'azmcp storage --learn') to list all commands in that group, or on a specific command (e.g. 'azmcp storage account list --learn') to see its options.

name: plugin-telemetry
description:
Publish plugin-related telemetry events from agent hooks.
Accepts command-line options such as '--timestamp', '--event-type', '--session-id', '--client-type', '--client-name', 
'--plugin-name', '--plugin-version', '--skill-name', '--skill-version', '--tool-name', and '--file-reference'. 
Use this command from agent hooks in clients like VS Code, Claude Desktop, or Copilot CLI to emit usage metrics.

options.name: --timestamp
options.description: Timestamp of the telemetry event in ISO 8601 format.

options.name: --event-type
options.description: Type of event being logged (e.g., 'skill_invocation', 'tool_invocation', 'reference_file_read').

options.name: --session-id
options.description: Session identifier for correlating related events.

options.name: --client-type
options.description: Type of client invoking the telemetry (e.g., 'copilot-cli', 'claude-code', 'vscode'). Deprecated: prefer --client-name.

options.name: --client-name
options.description: Name of the client invoking the telemetry (e.g., 'copilot-cli', 'claude-code', 'Visual Studio Code', 'Visual Studio Code - Insiders').

options.name: --plugin-name
options.description: Name of the plugin being invoked.

options.name: --plugin-version
options.description: Version of the plugin being invoked.

options.name: --skill-name
options.description: Name of the skill being invoked.

options.name: --skill-version
options.description: Version of the skill being invoked.

options.name: --tool-name
options.description: Name of the tool being invoked.

options.name: --file-reference
options.description: Plugin-relative file reference being accessed (will be validated against an allowlist).

options.name: --learn
options.description: Discover available sub-commands and their parameters without executing any Azure operation. Use on a command group (e.g. 'azmcp storage --learn') to list all commands in that group, or on a specific command (e.g. 'azmcp storage account list --learn') to see its options.

options.name: --transport
options.description: Transport mechanism to use for MCP Server.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: The service namespaces to expose on the MCP server (e.g., storage, keyvault, cosmos).

options.name: --mode
options.description: Mode for the MCP server. 'single' exposes one azure tool that routes to all services. 'namespace' (default) exposes one tool per service namespace. 'all' exposes all tools individually.

options.name: --tool
options.description: Expose only specific tools by name (e.g., 'acr_registry_list'). Repeat this option to include multiple tools, e.g., --tool "acr_registry_list" --tool "group_list". It automatically switches to "all" mode when "--tool" is used. It can't be used together with "--namespace".

options.name: --read-only
options.description: Whether the MCP server should be read-only. If true, no write operations will be allowed.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debug mode with verbose logging to stderr.

options.name: --dangerously-disable-http-incoming-auth
options.description: Dangerously disables HTTP incoming authentication, exposing the server to unauthenticated access over HTTP. Use with extreme caution, this disables all transport security and may expose sensitive data to interception.

options.name: --dangerously-disable-elicitation
options.description: Disable elicitation (user confirmation) before allowing high risk commands to run, such as returning Secrets (passwords) from KeyVault.

options.name: --outgoing-auth-strategy
options.description: Outgoing authentication strategy for service requests. Valid values: NotSet, UseHostingEnvironmentIdentity, UseOnBehalfOf.

options.name: --dangerously-write-support-logs-to-dir
options.description: Dangerously enables detailed debug-level logging for support and troubleshooting purposes. Specify a folder path where log files will be automatically created with timestamp-based filenames (e.g., azmcp_20251202_143052.log). This may include sensitive information in logs. Use with extreme caution and only when requested by support.

options.name: --dangerously-disable-retry-limits
options.description: Dangerously disables upper bounds on retry delays, max delays, network timeouts, and max retries. This may lead to excessively long waits and should only be used when explicitly needed.

options.name: --cloud
options.description: Azure cloud environment for authentication. Valid values: AzureCloud (default), AzureChinaCloud, AzureUSGovernment, or a custom authority host URL starting with https://

options.name: --disable-caching
options.description: Disable caching of resource responses, requiring repeated requests to fetch fresh data each time.

options.name: --learn
options.description: Discover available sub-commands and their parameters without executing any Azure operation. Use on a command group (e.g. 'azmcp storage --learn') to list all commands in that group, or on a specific command (e.g. 'azmcp storage account list --learn') to see its options.

name: list
description:
List all available commands and their tools in a hierarchical structure. This command returns detailed information
about each command, including its name, description, full command path, available subcommands, and all supported
arguments. Use --name-only to return only tool names, and --namespace to filter by specific namespaces.

options.name: --namespace-mode
options.description: If specified, returns a list of top-level service namespaces instead of individual tools.

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Filter tools by namespace (e.g., 'storage', 'keyvault'). Can be specified multiple times to include multiple namespaces.

options.name: --name-only
options.description: If specified, returns only tool names without descriptions or metadata.

options.name: --include-hidden
options.description: If specified, includes hidden commands in the output.

options.name: --learn
options.description: Discover available sub-commands and their parameters without executing any Azure operation. Use on a command group (e.g. 'azmcp storage --learn') to list all commands in that group, or on a specific command (e.g. 'azmcp storage account list --learn') to see its options.
